# Georges Sorel

*1847 – 1922 · French*

French revolutionary theorist: his Reflections on Violence opposes the proletarian violence of the general strike, a mobilizing myth that regenerates action, to the force of the bourgeois state, and influenced the far left and nationalist currents alike.

> Stub profile: only this mini-card exists so far; the sourced axis positions remain to be authored. Contributions welcome.
